title: ipomoea shumardiana
intro: Ipomoea shumardiana, also known as Shumard's morning glory or cardinal gloria, is a perennial vine native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Ipomoea shumardiana can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal and therapeutic benefits.
